zh.Spotbrough, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當John FitzWilliam於1297年出生在英國越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯時，他的父親William FitzWilliam44歲，母親Isabel Maud Deincourt22歲。他於1317年與Joan Dereresby在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1349年8月10日在英國越可爾艾姆利享年52歲。

zh-hans.Spotbrough, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John FitzWilliam于1297年出生在英国越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯时，他的父亲William FitzWilliam44岁，母亲Isabel Maud Deincourt22岁。他于1317年与Joan Dereresby在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1349年8月10日在英国越可爾艾姆利享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John FitzWilliam was born in 1297, in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, his father, William FitzWilliam, was 44 and his mother, Isabel Maud Deincourt, was 22. He married Joan Dereresby in 1317, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 10 August 1349, in Emley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John FitzWilliam est né en 1297, à Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William FitzWilliam, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Isabel Maud Deincourt, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan Dereresby en 1317, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 10 août 1349, à Emley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John FitzWilliam 1297 in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William FitzWilliam 44 und seine Mutter Isabel Maud Deincourt 22. Er hat 1317 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Dereresby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 10. August 1349 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Emley, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John FitzWilliam è nato il nel 1297 nel Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William FitzWilliam, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Maud Deincourt, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joan Dereresby nel 1317, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 10 agosto 1349, nel Emley, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John FitzWilliamが1297年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスプロトブロウ アンド クウスウオルスで生まれた時，父William FitzWilliamは44歳，母Isabel Maud Deincourtは22歳であった。1317年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでJoan Dereresbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1349年8月10日にイギリスヨークシュアイアエムリーで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John FitzWilliam(이)가 1297년 영국 요르크실르 스프로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William FitzWilliam(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Maud Deincourt(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1317년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Joan Dereresby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1349년 8월 10일 영국 요르크실르 리에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John FitzWilliam nasceu em 1297, em Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzWilliam, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Maud Deincourt, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Dereresby em 1317, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1349, em Emley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John FitzWilliam родился в 1297 г. в местности спротброую анд кусворт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William FitzWilliam было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Maud Deincourt, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Dereresby в 1317 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 10 августа 1349 г. в местности эмли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John FitzWilliam nació en 1297, en Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William FitzWilliam, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Isabel Maud Deincourt, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joan Dereresby en 1317, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1349, en Emley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
